title: DONATION PROGRAM - 211info
text: HELPING HANDS REENTRY BYBEE LAKES HOPE CENTER DONATION PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Accepts donations of personal care items such as shampoo, soap, toothpaste, toilet paper, deodorant, and feminine hygiene products. Also accepts financial donations. 14355 N Bybee Lake Court Portland, OR 97203 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: No standard hours Email (971) 333-5070 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (971) 333-5070 Intake Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website or email for more information or donation drop off time FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Multnomah, and Washington Counties SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Tri-Met 11 at N Leadbetter & Bybee Lake Court is closest stop 1/4 mile from facility. The bus line only runs Monday-Friday 5am-8am and 2pm-7pm. Closest MAX stop is at the Expo Center 4 miles east of the shelter. Services: Personal/Grooming Supplies Donation Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - HELPING HANDS REENTRY OUTREACH CENTERS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
